data.name: Auth.Email.Required
data.value: Email is required.

data.name: Auth.Email.Invalid
data.value: Enter a valid email address.

data.name: Auth.Email.TooLong
data.value: Email must be 256 characters or fewer.

data.name: Auth.Password.Required
data.value: Password is required.

data.name: Auth.Password.TooShort
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: Auth.Password.TooLong
data.value: Password must be 128 characters or fewer.

data.name: Auth.Password.Upper
data.value: Password must contain an uppercase letter.

data.name: Auth.Password.Lower
data.value: Password must contain a lowercase letter.

data.name: Auth.Password.Digit
data.value: Password must contain a digit.

data.name: Auth.RefreshToken.Required
data.value: Refresh token is required.

data.name: Auth.RefreshToken.TooLong
data.value: Refresh token is too long.

data.name: Task.Id.Required
data.value: Task id is required.

data.name: Task.Title.Required
data.value: Title is required.

data.name: Task.Title.TooLong
data.value: Title must be 200 characters or fewer.

data.name: Task.Description.TooLong
data.value: Description must be 2000 characters or fewer.

data.name: Task.Priority.Required
data.value: Priority is required.

data.name: Task.Priority.Invalid
data.value: Priority must be one of: Low, Medium, High, Critical.

data.name: Task.Status.Invalid
data.value: Status must be one of: Pending, InProgress, Completed.

data.name: Task.Tags.TooMany
data.value: A task can be associated with at most 50 tags.

data.name: Task.Reorder.SelfPrev
data.value: A task cannot be its own previous neighbour.

data.name: Task.Reorder.SelfNext
data.value: A task cannot be its own next neighbour.

data.name: Task.Reorder.SameNeighbour
data.value: Previous and next neighbours must be different tasks.

data.name: Tag.Id.Required
data.value: Tag id is required.

data.name: Tag.Name.Required
data.value: Tag name is required.

data.name: Tag.Name.TooLong
data.value: Tag name must be 50 characters or fewer.

data.name: Task.NotFound
data.value: Task with id '{0}' was not found.

data.name: Task.TitleRequired
data.value: Task title must not be empty.

data.name: Task.OwnerRequired
data.value: Task owner is required.

data.name: Task.TitleTooLong
data.value: Task title must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Task.DescriptionTooLong
data.value: Task description must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Task.DueDateInPast
data.value: Due date cannot be in the past.

data.name: Task.AlreadyCompleted
data.value: Task is already completed.

data.name: Task.NotCompleted
data.value: Task is not completed, cannot be reopened.

data.name: Task.UnknownStatus
data.value: Unknown status '{0}'.

data.name: Task.UnknownPriority
data.value: Unknown priority '{0}'.

data.name: User.InvalidCredentials
data.value: Email or password is incorrect.

data.name: User.EmailRequired
data.value: Email is required.

data.name: User.PasswordRequired
data.value: Password is required.

data.name: User.RegistrationFailed
data.value: Registration failed. Check the email and password, then try again.

data.name: User.LockedOut
data.value: Account is locked due to repeated failed attempts.

data.name: User.InvalidRefreshToken
data.value: Refresh token is invalid, expired, or revoked.

data.name: Tag.NotFound
data.value: Tag(s) not found: {0}.

data.name: Tag.OwnerRequired
data.value: Tag owner is required.

data.name: Tag.NameRequired
data.value: Tag name must not be empty.

data.name: Tag.NameTooLong
data.value: Tag name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Tag.AlreadyExists
data.value: A tag named '{0}' already exists for this user.
